title: Il giovedì
writer: Franco Castellano, Giuseppe Moccia, Dino Risi
actors: Walter Chiari, Michèle Mercier, Roberto Ciccolini
plot: It's the story of a day spent by Dino, separated by his wife, who sees his son Robertino after five years. Dino has not contributed anything in life and to win the affection of his son, invents a story about his past. At the end o...
